hero.subtitle: Join thousands of students learning from top instructors. Access interactive lessons, earn certificates, and advance your career at your own pace.

subjects.title: Explore Learning Paths
subjects.subtitle: Browse subjects tailored to your academic stage and start mastering the topics that matter most to you.

courses.title: Top-Rated Courses
courses.subtitle: Hand-picked courses from our best instructors, designed to help you achieve your learning goals faster.

teachers.title: Learn from the Best
teachers.subtitle: Our verified instructors bring real-world expertise and passion to every lesson they create.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible subscription plans designed to fit your learning needs and budget. Start free, upgrade anytime.
pricing.noPlans: No subscription plans available at the moment.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: Our platform is built with features designed to make your learning journey effective, engaging, and enjoyable.

interactive.title: Interactive Lessons
interactive.desc: Engage with hands-on exercises, quizzes, and real-time feedback to reinforce your understanding.

experts.title: Expert Instructors
experts.desc: Learn from industry professionals and academics who bring years of real-world experience to every course.

pace.title: Self-Paced Learning
pace.desc: Study on your own schedule with lifetime access to course materials and progress tracking.

certs.title: Recognized Certificates
certs.desc: Earn certificates upon completion that you can share on LinkedIn and add to your professional portfolio.

community.title: Community Support
community.desc: Join a vibrant community of learners, ask questions, share insights, and collaborate on projects.

multilang.title: Multilingual Platform
multilang.desc: Access content in multiple languages with full RTL support for Arabic and other right-to-left languages.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Career?
cta.subtitle: Join over 50,000 students already learning on our platform. Get unlimited access to all courses with a single subscription.
